description: You are configuring OpenProject for a facilities renovation project that requires custom enumeration values. Log in as admin (admin / Admin1234!). Create two new work package priorities named 'Critical - Safety' and 'Regulatory Deadline' (Active: Yes, Default: No). Create a new time tracking activity named 'Security Audit' (Active: Yes). Update the priority of the work package 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' in the 'E-Commerce Platform' project to 'Critical - Safety'.

metadata.target_wp_subject: Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari
